# SELEQT

> SELEQT is a boutique private wealth management firm based in Ahmedabad, India, serving Indian residents, NRIs, and globally mobile families. It operates on a fee-only, relationship-led basis and integrates investments, taxation, insurance, and succession planning under one platform, with particular focus on cross-border and NRI wealth.

## About
SELEQT is a private wealth advisory firm working with a deliberately small number of families and individuals. It combines investments, tax structuring, insurance, and succession planning into a single coordinated relationship, designed for clients whose ambitions, businesses, and assets span generations and geographies. SELEQT operates on a fee-only advisory basis; all material conflicts of interest are disclosed in writing prior to engagement.

## Services
- Investments: portfolio management, mutual funds, PMS (Portfolio Management Services, ₹50 lakh minimum per SEBI), AIFs (Alternative Investment Funds), and curated global opportunities. Research-led and concentrated.
- Taxation: personal and promoter tax structuring, NRI and global taxation, capital gains planning, cross-border structuring, and compliance coordination across jurisdictions.
- Insurance: life, health, business and key-person protection, NRI protection planning, and legacy/liquidity planning, advised independently rather than sold.
- Succession Planning: private family trusts, wills and estate planning, business succession, cross-border estate planning, family governance, and philanthropic structuring.
